---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for FabricCsharp
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. E.g., "I cannot express X in C# because the transpiler does not support Y."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature or enhancement you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful. If this feature enables a specific modding pattern or Minecraft API, please explain.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any workarounds or alternative approaches? If so, describe them and explain why they are insufficient.

## Additional Context

- Does this feature require changes to the C# → Java type mapping?
- Does this feature require new Roslyn analyzer rules (to detect misuse)?
- Does this feature require updates to the `dotnet new fabric-mod` template?
- Any relevant Minecraft/Fabric documentation links.

## Willing to Contribute

Are you willing to submit a PR implementing this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to implement this.
- [ ] No, I am requesting this as a user.
